best_for: Agent-based service, top JD Power scores
perks: Largest auto insurer in the US with extensive agent network
Top JD Power customer satisfaction rankings
Drive Safe and Save telematics discount program
Steer Clear program for young drivers to earn discounts
Strong bundling discounts with home and renters insurance
A++ AM Best financial strength rating
drawbacks: Not always the cheapest option for younger or high-risk drivers
Digital experience lags behind GEICO and Progressive
Rates vary widely by state and agent
